info.title: KV Silver Zone API
info.description: API documentation for KV Silver Zone. Auth is via an httpOnly cookie set on /auth/login (a Bearer token is also returned for API clients). Protected endpoints accept either.

message.example: price must be a positive number

imageBase64.description: Base64 data URL or image URL

ProductPricing.description: Live pricing breakdown computed server-side from the silver rate.

image.description: Base64 data URL or image URL

token.description: JWT (also set as an httpOnly cookie)

200.description: List of all silver rate records

post.summary: Upsert today's silver rate for a purity

200.description: List of all metal rate records

post.summary: Upsert metal rate for date + metal + karat

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

post.summary: Reconcile stock with a physical count

200.description: Products at or below stock threshold

put.summary: Update the GST rate applied at checkout

get.summary: List all gift voucher denominations (incl. inactive)

201.description: Account created; sets httpOnly cookie and returns user + token

200.description: Authenticated; sets httpOnly cookie and returns user + token

post.summary: Clear the auth cookie and log out

200.description: Logged out; clears the auth cookie
Password reset link sent if the email exists

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Product ID of the cart item to remove

reason.description: Present when not serviceable to a standard courier
reason.example: Remote area — serviceable via manual arrangement

200.description: List of the authenticated user's orders

get.summary: Get a single order by ID

post.summary: Resend the order confirmation email (owner or admin)

429.description: Throttled — a confirmation was sent very recently

post.summary: Verify Razorpay payment and create order

get.summary: Get all reviews for a product

200.description: List of reviews for the product

post.summary: Submit a review for a product

orderId.description: Id of the order being returned

200.description: List of the user's return requests
List of the user's savings schemes

post.summary: Record a monthly payment for a savings scheme

get.summary: Get today's silver rates for all purities
List the current user's saved addresses

put.summary: Update user password (self or admin only)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user whose password is being changed

post.summary: Add a product to the wishlist

productId.description: ID of the product to add

delete.summary: Remove a product from the wishlist
